title: sisyrinchium graminifolium subsp. luteum
intro: Sisyrinchium graminifolium subsp. luteum, also known as yellow blue-eyed grass, is a plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Sisyrinchium graminifolium subsp. luteum is often prepared as a tea or tincture in herbal medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
